ast.name: warn
ast.source: One of the Column Summary plugins' destination points you provided is beyond the table boundaries!
ast.target: 您提供的某个列汇总插件的目标点超出了表格边界！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: You need to configure the Nested Headers plugin in order to use collapsible headers.
ast.target: 您需要配置嵌套表头插件才能使用可折叠表头。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Trailing quote on quoted field is malformed
ast.target: 引号字段的尾部引号格式错误

ast.name: message
ast.source: `base` must be provided only when the output is `byte`
ast.target: 仅当输出为 `byte` 时才需提供 `base`

ast.name: message
ast.source: `prefixSymbol` can be provided only when the output is `percent`
ast.target: 仅当输出为 `percent` 时才可提供 `prefixSymbol`

ast.name: message
ast.source: the language tag must follow the BCP 47 specification (see https://tools.ieft.org/html/bcp47)
ast.target: 语言标签必须遵循 BCP 47 规范（参见 https://tools.ieft.org/html/bcp47）
